techcrunch.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
techcrunch.summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
techcrunch.summary: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

techcrunch.title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the US
techcrunch.summary: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

techcrunch.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
techcrunch.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]

techcrunch.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
techcrunch.summary: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI’s Jalapeño chip is Big Tech’s spiciest move away from Nvidia
techcrunch.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]

techcrunch.title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
techcrunch.summary: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

techcrunch.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
techcrunch.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

techcrunch.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
techcrunch.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
techcrunch.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.
